property.name: dfs.replication
property.description: Default replication count for development cluster

property.name: dfs.permissions.enabled
property.description: Disable HDFS permissions checks to avoid user mismatches during testing

property.name: dfs.namenode.name.dir
property.description: Local filesystem path for NameNode storage

property.name: dfs.datanode.data.dir
property.description: Local filesystem path for DataNode storage
